name: faq-accordion
title: Faq Accordion
description: A centered FAQ accordion with an optional CTA, installed as a wired Payload block.

preview.summary: Centered single-column FAQ accordion with an optional support CTA.

sampleContent.title: Frequently asked questions
sampleContent.description: Short answers to what teams ask before rolling the product out company-wide.

items.question: How long does setup take?
items.answer: Most teams connect their first data source and ship a dashboard in an afternoon — there is no infrastructure to provision.

items.question: Which data sources are supported?
items.answer: Postgres, BigQuery, Snowflake, and any warehouse that speaks SQL, plus a REST ingestion endpoint for everything else.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Start on the free tier with no credit card; upgrade once you outgrow the included usage.
